title: Water Blaster Backpack for Kids – Dinosaur or Unicorn Design – 2 Assorted Styles – Backpack Water Gun with Adjustable Straps – 1.1L Tank – Summer Toy for Children (Dinosaur Water Blaster Backpack)
features: TWO FUN DESIGNS TO CHOOSE FROM: Comes in either a fierce dinosaur or magical unicorn design – perfect for sparking imagination and outdoor fun in the garden, beach, or park.
BACKPACK DESIGN FOR EASY CARRYING: Lightweight backpack fits comfortably on kids’ shoulders with adjustable straps – allows hands-free water transport for extended play.
1.1 LITRE WATER TANK CAPACITY: Carry extra water on your back and stay battle-ready longer – just screw on the cap and secure the rubber O-ring for a tight, leak-free seal.
POWERFUL WATER GUN ACTION: Attach the blaster to the backpack and shoot water up to 15ft – great for soaking targets from a distance and winning every water fight!
COMPLETE SET INCLUDED: Each pack contains a themed backpack, gun, connecting tube and comfortable straps – all made from durable, kid-safe plastic for repeated use.
PERFECT FOR SUMMER FUN: Ideal for holidays, BBQs, birthdays, beach days or just cooling off in the garden – encourages outdoor play and active fun for children aged 3+.
COMPACT AND KID-FRIENDLY SIZE: Backpack measures 15cm x 22cm and the water blaster is 21cm x 9cm — perfectly sized for little adventurers to wear and play with ease.
description: Product description Make a splash this summer with the Water Blaster Backpack for Kids – the ultimate outdoor water fight accessory! Choose between two fun and colourful designs: a fierce blue-green dinosaur or a magical pink-purple unicorn with rainbow accents. Each water blaster backpack is lightweight and designed for comfort, with fully adjustable shoulder straps to fit most children aged 3 and up. Stay ready for battle with a 1.1 litre water tank – no need to constantly refill. Simply screw the cap onto the bottom of the backpack and push the rubber O-ring securely into the cap for a tight seal. The gun connects via a flexible tube, allowing continuous water blasting without needing to hold a tank. The blaster shoots water up to 15 feet , giving kids an exciting range for soaking friends and family. Whether it’s a garden party, day at the beach, or a sunny weekend in the park, this backpack water gun adds hours of active fun and adventure to any summer outing. Each set includes everything needed: 1 backpack tank, 1 water blaster gun, 1 hose tube, and adjustable backpack straps. Made from durable plastic for repeated use, it’s the perfect gift idea for birthdays, holidays or just to encourage screen-free outdoor play. Get ready to soak, splash, and play with the coolest water gun backpack in town! Safety Warning Not suitable for under 36 months.
